planSteps.description: Navigate to the AI Mind Map homepage
Verify the homepage loads with a visible navigation bar containing links and the hero section is present
Verify the Tools page loads and shows a heading about MCP tools and multiple tool cards are visible
Verify the Calculator page loads and shows a token savings calculator with at least one interactive slider
Verify the Install page loads and shows agent selection buttons and an install command code block
Click the logo or 'Home' navigation link to return to the homepage
Verify the homepage loads again with the hero headline and install command box visible, confirming full navigation cycle works correctly
